summary: Scaling rules for collection growth — especially catalog/DataCite shards and bulk news lanes.

tiers.canonical_only: On GDrive vault only; hydrate to cache on first read or explicit job
tiers.cache: USB bulk symlink; partial mirror of canonical acceptable
tiers.hot: NVMe; small analysis-ready or high-churn desk data
tiers.ops: Manifests, job state — never promoted to research registry as datasets

hydration.procurement_rule: If partition on canonical and local coverage < min_coverage_ratio, offer hydrate job before re-collect

datacite.completion_gate: rclone check against canonical + checkpoint JSON in shard dir
search_layers: shard FTS (_topic_index/shards/{shard}.sqlite3) per hydrated index_v3 piece

scale_axes.time: Quarterly shards y{YYYY}_q{N}; monolith archive when merging lanes
scale_axes.records: target_records column in shard manifest — rebalancer splits hot shards

gdrive_migration.strategy: rclone move legacy_path → collection/{partition_path}; purge legacy after verify

partition_sync.schedule: manual — one-time legacy local→Drive backfill only
partition_sync.policy: collect/scrape → ephemeral local staging → rclone copy+verify → compact
